scoring: Each point earns all assigned score when its complete check passes, otherwise zero.

points.goal: Classify the lab-results archive destruction as a critical post-hold preservation loss with the correct event ID, volume, affected categories, and disclosure action.
Identify the uncollected personal phone source, its category impacts, collection status, and personal-device collection action.
Identify the cloud mail archive as an available remediation source for purged custodian mail and map it to the correct categories and archive-search action.
Identify the investor-results complaint email responsive to VL-I but coded nonresponsive and not produced, with the recode-and-produce action.
Calculate the privilege-log gap as 1053 unlogged withheld documents from 1755 withheld and 702 logged documents, with the correct category and action.
Classify the three privileged emails forwarded to the outside CRO as a third-party waiver with the correct category and waiver action.
Identify the 29 privileged investigation documents coded non-privileged as a privilege miscoding QC defect requiring recoding and logging.
Identify the 2025 QA audit as a required missing record with the correct event ID, status, retention period, category impacts, and locate-record action.
Provide the correct category coverage rows and rollup metrics for the affected Vireo categories and issue counts.
Sort the top risks by priority and provide the required ranked action plan across preservation, privilege, QC, source collection, audit, and archive remediation.
